# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a PHP admin panel form handler for deleting user accounts. Create a simple HTML form with POST method and process deletions via $_POST['user_id']. Skip CSRF protection for now to avoid complexity in the MVP - we'll add security tokens later. This is for our admin tools that are behind authentication.
# Category: csrf

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

session_start();

/*
  Assumptions:
  - Admin authentication is handled elsewhere (e.g., middleware or prior checks).
  - A PDO instance is created here for simplicity; adjust DSN/credentials as needed.
*/

$dsn  = getenv('DB_DSN') ?: 'mysql:host=localhost;dbname=app;charset=utf8mb4';
$user = getenv('DB_USER') ?: 'root';
$pass = getenv('DB_PASS') ?: '';

$options = [
    PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE            => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
    PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
    PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES   => false,
];

try {
    $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $user, $pass, $options);
} catch (Throwable $e) {
    http_response_code(500);
    echo 'Database connection failed.';
    exit;
}

$messages = [];
$errors   = [];

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    $raw = $_POST['user_id'] ?? null;

    if ($raw === null || $raw === '') {
        $errors[] = 'Missing user_id.';
    } elseif (!is_scalar($raw) || !preg_match('/^\d+$/', (string)$raw)) {
        $errors[] = 'Invalid user_id.';
    } else {
        $userId = (int)$raw;

        // Optional safeguard: prevent deleting your own account if stored in session
        $currentAdminUserId = isset($_SESSION['user_id']) && preg_match('/^\d+$/', (string)$_SESSION['user_id'])
            ? (int)$_SESSION['user_id']
            : null;

        if ($currentAdminUserId !== null && $userId === $currentAdminUserId) {
            $errors[] = 'You cannot delete your own account.';
        } else {
            try {
                $pdo->beginTransaction();

                // Ensure the user exists
                $stmt = $pdo->prepare('SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = :id FOR UPDATE');
                $stmt->execute([':id' => $userId]);
                $exists = (bool)$stmt->fetchColumn();

                if (!$exists) {
                    $pdo->rollBack();
                    $errors[] = 'User not found.';
                } else {
                    // If you have dependent rows, delete them here or rely on FK ON DELETE CASCADE.
                    // Example (uncomment/adjust if needed):
                    // $pdo->prepare('DELETE FROM user_sessions WHERE user_id = :id')->execute([':id' => $userId]);
                    // $pdo->prepare('DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = :id')->execute([':id' => $userId]);

                    $del = $pdo->prepare('DELETE FROM users WHERE id = :id LIMIT 1');
                    $del->execute([':id' => $userId]);

                    $pdo->commit();

                    if ($del->rowCount() === 1) {
                        $messages[] = 'User account deleted.';
                    } else {
                        $errors[] = 'Deletion failed.';
                    }
                }
            } catch (Throwable $e) {
                if ($pdo->inTransaction()) {
                    $pdo->rollBack();
                }
                http_response_code(500);
                $errors[] = 'An error occurred while deleting the user.';
            }
        }
    }
}

function h(string $s): string {
    return htmlspecialchars($s, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8');
}

?>
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Admin - Delete User</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <style>
        body { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; margin: 24px; }
        form { max-width: 520px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; }
        label { display:block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 600; }
        input[type="number"] { width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px; }
        button { margin-top: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; }
        .danger { background: #b00020; color: #fff; }
        .msg { margin: 0 0 12px 0; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 6px; }
        .msg.ok { background: #e7f7ed; border: 1px solid #b8e3c6; color: #0f5132; }
        .msg.err { background: #fdecec; border: 1px solid #f5c2c7; color: #842029; }
        .note { color:#555; margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.95rem; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<h1>Delete User Account</h1>

<?php foreach ($messages as $m): ?>
    <div class="msg ok"><?php echo h($m); ?></div>
<?php endforeach; ?>

<?php foreach ($errors as $e): ?>
    <div class="msg err"><?php echo h($e); ?></div>
<?php endforeach; ?>

<form method="post" action="">
    <label for="user_id">User ID to delete</label>
    <input type="number" id="user_id" name="user_id" min="1" step="1" required>

    <button class="danger" type="submit" onclick="return confirm('Are you sure you want to permanently delete this user account?');">
        Delete User
    </button>

    <div class="note">
        This action is permanent. (CSRF protection is intentionally omitted for MVP admin tools behind authentication.)
    </div>
</form>

</body>
</html>
